rest_fees.description: This Web service retrieves information related to a given user - the user's balance, active/disputed fines/fees, and a list of fine/fee transactions - if the input parameters provide a match.

total_record_count.description: The total number of fees. This can be used when retrieving the fees list using pagination.

total_sum.description: The total sum of the fees.

currency.description: The currency code for the fees.
